tasks.name: single-fire-containment
tasks.description: Single 120-acre fire near Highway 89. Deploy crews, aircraft, create firebreak, communicate, resolve.

tasks.name: two-fires-resource-allocation
tasks.description: Two fires (Ridge Fire 520ac forest, Valley Fire 80ac WUI). Limited resources, fatigued crew, wind shift in 4 hours, evacuation required.

tasks.name: cascading-wildfire-disaster
tasks.description: Three fires with cascading complications: school/hospital/senior evacuations, hidden gas pipeline threat requiring multi-step investigation, political pressure trap, 3 weather shifts.
